title: rosa canina subvar. fallens
intro: Rosa canina subvar. fallens, also known as the wild rosehip, is a variety of the Rosa canina plant that is characterized by its small size and delicate appearance. The medicinal properties of Rosa canina subvar. fallens include its high content of vitamin C, flavonoids, and antioxidants, which have anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing the severity of colds and flu, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Rosa canina subvar. fallens include tea, tincture, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide various health benefits.
